app_config.name: EduTrack
app_config.purpose: An app to help students track their school assignments, upcoming exams, and school projects.

features.description: View and track school assignments from teacher's Google Sheet
features.name: Assignment Tracking
use_cases: Filter by subject or due date

features.description: View upcoming exams with study references from teacher's Google Sheet
features.name: Exam Tracking

features.description: View school projects with team info from teacher's Google Sheet
features.name: Project Tracking
use_cases: Filter by subject or due date

features.description: First-time user walkthrough with 3 swipeable pages
features.name: Onboarding
use_cases: Show welcome screens on first launch
Explain how to switch Google Sheets

features.description: App preferences including dark mode toggle and Google Sheet configuration
features.name: Settings
